title: 2026/03/09 - ENV (Part 1 of 2)
description: Monday, 9th March 2026 | Environment Committee Planning Bill; Natural Environment Bill Hearing of evidence: New Zealand Winegrowers Beca Limited Andrea Rickard, Managing Director NZ Bryce Julyan, Senior Principal Planner New Zealand Planning Institute Andrea Harris, Chair David Curtis, CEO Emily Grace, Chief Policy Officer Te Rūnanga o Toa Rangatira Callum Katene, Rawiri Faulkner, Aimee Bishop, Aquaculture New Zealand Steph Hopkins, Policy Manager Stewart Hawthorn, Teena Hale Pennington, Coromandel Marine Farmers Association Nicole Zeier, Executive Officer Chloe Bull, Canterbury Regional Council Dr Deon Swiggs, Chair Iaean Cranwell, Deputy Chair of the Canterbury Regional Council Megan McKay, Councillor Olivia Cook, Council officer Patrick Lindsay, Council officer Hamilton City Council Councillor Maria Huata, Chair of the Growth and Economic Development Committee Dr Juliana Reu Junqueira, Unit Director – Urban and Spatial Planning Unit Hannah Windle, Unit Director – Strategic Planning and Advocacy J-Swap Bay of Plenty Regional Council Councillor Glenn Dougal, Deputy Chair Councillor Te Whau, Chair of Komiti Māori Kat Macmillan, Chair of the Strategy and Policy Committee Stephen Lamb, Natural Resource Policy Manager Adele Hadfield, Strategy and Planning Manager Ella Tennant, Consents Manager Port of Auckland Alistair Kirk, General Manager - Infrastructure Julie Wagener, BusinessNZ John Pask, Chief Economist Waikato Regional Airport Limited Mark Morgan, CEO Robert Dol, Group GM Property and Infrastructure
